title: HATCHIMALS Bloomables, Puppyfly Surprise Interactive Toy and Flower with Repeatable Reveal and Transformation, 100+ Sounds and Reactions (Styles Vary), Kids Toys for Girls and Boys.
features: Blooms with your love: Bloomables are magical creatures from Hatchtopia that bloom and transform. With a repeatable double reveal from Hatchipillar to Puppyfly, 100+ sounds and reactions, love them to life

Exciting transformations: Shower the flower with love until the petals open, revealing an adorable Hatchipillar. When her antennae glow rainbow, set her in the flower, enjoy lights and music and watch the flower bloom to reveal Puppyfly
1 of 2 Puppyfly characters: Who will you bloom? Discover 1 of 2 Puppyfly interactive toys with expressive eyes, soft plush and colourful Puppyfly wings. Bloom and repeat the reveals again and again
So many ways to play: Cuddle, tickle, feed and pet your Hatchipillar; with Puppyfly, sing and play music, tell fortunes and so much more. Includes 3 AA batteries
Includes: 1 Bloomables, 1 Flower, 2 Accessories (1 Watering Can, 1 Leaf), 1 Quick Start Guide, 1 Instruction Sheet, 3 AA Batteries

Surprise toys for girls and boys: Bloomables by Hatchimals for girls and boys are must-have birthday gifts or gifts for any special occasion. Discover Hatchimals toys and games, toy figures and playsets (sold separately)
